description: Aimed at the urban go-getter, Bottled Night by hugo boss opens with lavender and birch tree aromas. The glass flacon body is reminiscent of a hot summer night. This is one of the world's best sold fragrances. Dab some for an evening date or a weekend party at an upscale club. Quantity: 30 ml Caution FlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
